prompt: 生成一个代码质量报告，显示这个项目的代码度量指标。

assertions.name: output_is_json
assertions.description: Output should be valid JSON format

assertions.name: contains_metadata
assertions.description: Output should contain metadata (scan directory, time, etc.)

assertions.name: has_language_distribution
assertions.description: Output should contain language distribution information

assertions.name: has_detailed_file_stats
assertions.description: Output should contain detailed file statistics
